title: Diogo92's - Dragon Block C
description: HD retexture for the DBC mod by JinRyuu.
body:
![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/366bff0ddd8218bd7db3f7a1fe8fbf94ac6fa471.png)

Diogo92's - Dragon Block C is a project I've been working on for a while, it's focus is continuing Kasai's hd textures while he doesn't update the main pack.

Features:

HD Npcs, clothing and races based on Kasai style.
HD Items based on Jappa's style.

 Changelog:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
Version 2.0:
-Partial Kakarot map support.

-Slightly edited menus and icons.

-Retextured clothing items

-Remade lots of old textures like General blue, Pilaf, etc.

-Recolored and fixed errors in Kasai original textures.

-Fixed first person hands not showing the HD texture.

-Made variations for first form arcosians and made the missing textures.

-More variations on namekians face textures.

-Edited Majin faces to be more unique and detailed.

-No glow transformations textures.

</details>

Credits:

Kasai for doing and inspiring various textures in this pack.

Videl1sHere for helping with various textures.

Jin for making a wonderful mod.

Akira Toryama for making a wonderful story.
